needs.summary: Monthly AI usage headline stats: total voice parses, split into on-device (free) vs fallback-model parses, plus estimated upstream model spend for the month in integer kobo. The dashboard currently derives fallback counts client-side from per-business onDevicePct; a real backend should return real counts per execution mode.
needs.filters/actions: Scoped to current calendar month, across all businesses

needs.summary: Weekly voice-parse volume time series for the trailing 12 weeks, feeding the sparkline and its peak-week caption.
needs.filters/actions: Aggregated per week, trailing 12 weeks, all businesses, all execution modes, ordered ascending by weekStart; peak week is computed client-side

needs.summary: Per-business AI usage rollup for the month: business identity and plan tier, voice parse count, share of parses handled on-device (percent 0-100), AI insight count, and total credits debited (fallback parses at 1 credit plus insights at 4 credits, per the unified OweMe credit ladder).
needs.filters/actions: Filter by plan (all|starter|market|business|wholesale|enterprise, the rev 2 five-tier ladder); sorted by parses descending; scoped to current month; admin-table pagination per conventions ({ data, page, total }) once row counts grow

needs.summary: Recent fallback-model parse log: timestamp, owning business name, anonymised transcript snippet (customer names reduced to initials, anonymisation is a server-side obligation before the payload reaches the admin surface), outcome parsed|failed, and credits charged (1 when parsed, 0 when failed since failed parses are not charged).
needs.filters/actions: Fallback execution mode only; most recent first; small window (screen shows 10 rows)
